data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Quiet hours compliance (don't text at 3am)', which is explicitly stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this requirement is being met. The absence of evidence regarding the enforcement of quiet hours indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of implementation for quiet hours compliance (not sending texts at 3am).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
